name: Heaven and Hell Cake (Mousse)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Peanut butter, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. In the bowl of an electric mixer, whip the cream cheese until light and creamy.
2. Gradually beat in the confectioners' sugar, then the peanut butter. Continue beating until thoroughly incorporated and fluffy. If the mixture looks lumpy, add 2 tablespoons of the heavy cream. If it may not smooth out perfectly, but it will be easier to blend.
3. Transfer the mixture to another bowl and set aside.
4. Place the remaining heavy cream in the electric mixer bowl and whip until stiff.
5. Carefully, but thoroughly, combine both mixtures. Set aside.
